name: skill performance report includes an aggregate-of-all-skills summary block at the top
command:
mkdir -p skills .claude-tdd-pro/skills && printf 'flow-guard:
  latency_p50_ms: 120
  success_rate: 0.92
profile-suggest:
  latency_p50_ms: 80
  success_rate: 0.85
' > .claude-tdd-pro/skills/perf-stats.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/perf.sh" --stats .claude-tdd-pro/skills/perf-stats.yaml --out skills/PERF.md --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && head -20 skills/PERF.md | grep -q 'aggregate' && head -20 skills/PERF.md | grep -q 'skills_total: 2' && echo ok 1>&2
